package.name: hyumm_vive
package.description: Header-only vive localization library (ViveLocalizer). Anchors the libsurvive tracker poses onto vive_world (fixed reference tracker) and computes the mobile-base center pose + twist. Consumed in-process by the hyumm_nrt node; no ROS nodes or topic exchange of its own. ROS2 (ament) port: tf2 datatypes.
